fix(opam): add miaou-registry to miaou-core dependencies

miaou_widgets_layout, miaou_widgets_display, and miaou_widgets_input all
depend on miaou-registry at compile time but miaou-core.opam did not
declare it.  When pinning the repo, opam would try to build miaou-core
without installing miaou-registry first, causing a build failure.

[Explorer] Simplify coordinator fetching to use only getCoordinator() (#261)

## Summary
Removed fallback logic for fetching the coordinator address and
simplified the implementation to use only the `getCoordinator()`
function from the consensus contract.

## Key Changes
- **Removed fallback mechanism**: Eliminated the dual-approach strategy
that tried `getCoordinator()` first and fell back to `COORDINATOR()` if
it failed
- **Simplified fetchCoordinator function**: Changed from a complex
`Promise.allSettled()` pattern to a single direct `readContract` call
- **Exported consensusAbi**: Made `consensusAbi` public and added
`getCoordinator()` function definition to it
- **Removed unused code**: Deleted `COORDINATOR_UPPER_ABI` and
`GET_COORDINATOR_ABI` parseAbi calls, now relying on the shared
`consensusAbi`
- **Updated tests**: Simplified test cases to reflect the new
single-method approach:
  - Removed test for fallback behavior
- Updated error handling test to expect the raw error instead of a
wrapped message
  - Fixed caching test expectations (now expects 1 call instead of 2)
  - Removed conditional logic from mock implementations

## Implementation Details
The change assumes that `getCoordinator()` is the standard, reliable
method for fetching the coordinator address from the consensus contract.
This simplifies error handling and reduces complexity while maintaining
the same caching behavior for successful calls.

fix(bingo): fix unique constraint error in promoteVirtualRound

bingoEventService._onRoundCreated races to INSERT a new row for the on-chain
round_id before promoteVirtualRound can UPDATE the virtual row to that ID.
The UNIQUE constraint on round_id blocked the UPDATE with a 500 error.

Fix: wrap DELETE (orphan from event indexer, room_number IS NULL) + UPDATE in
a transaction. Atomic: any concurrent event re-insert hits ON CONFLICT and
does a harmless UPDATE instead of creating a duplicate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(agent): raise prompt injection confidence threshold to 0.85 (#34)

Normal identity questions like "你是什么模型" were being falsely
flagged as prompt injection at confidence=0.7. Align threshold with
sensitive politics check (0.85) to reduce false positives.

Langfuse prompt `guard_prompt_injection` v2 also updated separately
to exclude identity questions from injection detection.

commit.message:
fix(bingo): restore on-chain card purchase with virtual round support

- buyCards() in useBingoGame now calls contract.buyCards() directly (on-chain)
  instead of the off-chain API that deducted backend balance (causing 402 errors)
- Added prepareRound() flow: virtual rounds (round_id ≥ 1,000,000,001) are
  promoted on-chain before the contract call via POST /api/bingo/prepare-round
- bingoService.prepareRound(): idempotent, concurrent-call-safe via _pendingPromotions map
- promoteVirtualRound(): now updates scheduled_close to on-chain value in DB
- bingoSchedulerOnChain: uses dbId (SERIAL PK) for all DB queries in roomLoop so
  round_id changes from virtual→real don't cause missed card counts or wrong cancels
- Scheduler detects already-promoted rounds and skips redundant promoteVirtualRound()
- POST /api/bingo/prepare-round route added (auth + bingo_enabled flag required)

commit.message:
Run 36: Full EngineAI velocity tracking + stability — Run 35 stood still

Run 35 KILLED at iter 1443: ref_joint_pos at 2.2 caused standing still
(vel_x stuck at 0.05, robot optimized for default pose not walking).

Fix: boost velocity tracking to full EngineAI (1.4/1.1), revert
ref_joint_pos to /1.5 (1.47). Keep stability rewards (orientation 1.0,
base_height 0.2, vel_mismatch 0.5) and tighter termination (0.65m).

Fix epoch rollover history pagination bugs (#259)

## Summary

Fixes two bugs in the epoch rollover history pagination that prevented
navigating through the complete epoch history:

1. Empty pages would disable the "Load more" button even though earlier
epochs existed
2. The last entry on each page was duplicated on the next page

## Changes

- **`explorer/src/lib/consensus.ts`**
- Added `fromBlock: bigint` to `EpochRolloverResult` to track the search
window start for pagination fallback
- Modified `loadEpochRolloverHistory` to pass `cursor - 1n` to
`getBlockRange` instead of `cursor`, preventing the boundary block from
being included in both pages
- Updated `reachedGenesis` logic to also return `true` when `fromBlock
=== 0n`, indicating the search has reached genesis block

- **`explorer/src/hooks/useEpochRolloverHistory.tsx`**
- Updated `getNextPageParam` to fall back to `lastPage.fromBlock` when
no entries exist, allowing empty pages to advance pagination instead of
stopping

- **`explorer/src/lib/consensus.test.ts`**
  - Updated existing test to verify `cursor - 1n` behavior
  - Added test for `fromBlock` exposure in results
  - Added test for `reachedGenesis` when search window reaches block 0
  - Updated empty results test to verify `fromBlock` is returned

## Implementation Details

The fix uses a cursor offset strategy: when paginating backwards through
history, the next page's upper bound is `cursor - 1n` rather than
`cursor`. This ensures the block containing the boundary entry is not
fetched twice. For empty pages, the pagination cursor falls back to
`fromBlock` (the start of the search window) to continue advancing
backwards through history rather than stopping prematurely.

commit.message:
[Explorer] E000 Phase 1: Add transaction list controls with auto-refresh toggle (#255)

## Summary
This PR adds a new `TransactionListControls` component that provides
users with manual refresh and auto-refresh toggle functionality for the
transaction proposals list. The component displays the last update
timestamp and allows users to control whether the list automatically
refreshes.

## Key Changes
- **New Component**: Created `TransactionListControls` component with:
  - Manual "Refresh now" button that triggers data refetch
  - Auto-refresh toggle button (ON/OFF)
- Last updated timestamp display with `formatLastUpdated` utility
function
  - Loading spinner during fetch operations
  - Proper disabled state handling while fetching

- **Hook Enhancement**: Modified `useRecentTransactionProposals` to
accept an `autoRefresh` parameter that controls whether automatic
refetching is enabled

- **State Management**: Added `autoRefresh` state in the main `AppInner`
component to manage the toggle state and pass it through to the hook

- **Integration**: Updated `RecentTransactionProposals` component to
accept and render the new controls with all necessary props

## Implementation Details
- The `formatLastUpdated` function formats timestamps using
`Intl.DateTimeFormat` with hour, minute, second, and timezone
information, displaying "—" when no update has occurred
- The refresh button is disabled during fetch operations to prevent
duplicate requests
- A spinning SVG icon appears while data is being fetched
- The auto-refresh toggle uses the `aria-pressed` attribute for proper
accessibility
- Comprehensive test coverage included for both the utility function and
component behavior

https://claude.ai/code/session_01P7eouj2aUvvLgaEzTzjStq

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(streak): allow thps theme server-side, remove missing tricks, use exact pixel centering

- Server: add 'thps' to valid streak theme allow-list so the preference
  persists on page refresh (was silently rejected as BAD_REQUEST)
- Manifest: remove 5 trick images that no longer exist in the folder
- StreakDisplay: replace CSS-variable offset calc with getBoundingClientRect()
  on <main> for deterministic centering — getComputedStyle returns custom
  property values as unresolved literal strings, causing inconsistent
  positions across themes and viewport sizes

commit.message:
fix: 설비 가동률 계산 시 주말 제외하여 정확한 가동률 표시

가동률 = 실제생산량 / (일최대생산량 × 기간일수) 에서
기간일수를 달력일수(주말포함)가 아닌 평일(월~금)만 카운트하도록 수정.
예: 30일 기간 → 23 평일로 계산, 가동률 약 30% 상승.

commit.message:
Run 35: Stability-focused — selective full EngineAI weights + tighter termination

Goal: eliminate falling. Selectively boost 6 stability-critical rewards to
full EngineAI while keeping 13 others at proven /1.5 scaling.

Changes:
- termination_height: 0.45 → 0.65m (tighter margin, 0.163m vs 0.36m)
- push_interval_s: 15.0 → 8.0s (more frequent reactive stepping practice)
- rew_orientation: 0.67 → 1.0 (stronger upright incentive)
- rew_ref_joint_pos: 1.47 → 2.2 (tighter gait tracking)
- rew_base_height: 0.13 → 0.2 (maintain standing height)
- rew_vel_mismatch: 0.33 → 0.5 (penalize unwanted z-motion)
- rew_track_vel_hard: 0.33 → 0.5 (force velocity tracking)
- rew_low_speed: 0.13 → 0.2 (punish slowness)

commit.message:
fix: промпт — скрыть chain-of-thought + фикс S=/P= итогов

- AI думает про себя, выводит только сводку (экономия ~1000 токенов)
- Предупреждение: S= и P= внизу страницы = итог, не отдельная комната
- Проверка: S= должен совпадать с length×width, иначе считай сам
- Периметр >30м = скорее всего итог нескольких комнат

commit.message:
Replace Creality filament DB with SpoolmanDB

- Add SpoolmanFilament Room entity, SpoolmanDao, SpoolmanFilamentDB
  (single global DB replacing per-printer material_database_<pType>)
- Add Utils.generateFilamentId / generateVendorId (deterministic hash-based
  5-char hex IDs, identical algorithm needed in CFsync Python)
- Add Utils.fetchSpoolmanDb to download donkie.github.io/SpoolmanDB/filaments.json
- Refactor MainActivity: 3-level cascade UI (brand → material type → color
  variant spinner), auto-fills color hex on variant selection
- Remove Creality DB files: Filament.java, MatDB.java, filamentDB.java,
  MaterialItem.java
- Remove all dead methods: openUpdate, populateDatabase, addFilament,
  removeFilament, saveDBToPrinter, GetMaterial*, getMaterial*
- Remove unused bindings: AddDialogBinding, EditDialogBinding,
  SaveDialogBinding, UpdateDialogBinding
- Add colorvariant spinner to activity_main layout (row 2, right side)
- Update drawer menu: replace DB import/export items with Refresh Filament DB
- Add cfsync-plan.md documenting how CFsync should push generated
  material_database.json to the printer via SSH after reboots
